form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but had to contend with second when clocking 20.79 over 365m at this track. Solid formlines coming through that last run. Looks a major player.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped off heels in the turn to the home straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Last start finished 6th on March 30 over 365m at this track behind Baby Time beaten 8 lengths (21.41) in a Grade 5. Around the mark two starts back. Winning chance on that form.

form.formComment: Could only manage sixth last time but the start prior hit the frame at double figure odds when second (18.68) over 320m at Wagga. Aided by a low draw and is worth plenty of thought.

form.formComment: Impressive performance to score by 5.5 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at this track, recording an enormous 20.48 over the 365m journey. Can measure up again if runs up to that effort.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (22.04) in a Grade 5, finishing a 17 length seventh. Yet to win but has placed three times from this draw. Looking to others.
